title: The Broken Bridge
description: The only bridge across a raging river has collapsed. Several weary travelers stand nearby, unsure how to continue. Time is running short, and every choice comes with a cost.

options.title: Repair the Bridge
options.description: Spend your time and supplies rebuilding the crossing for everyone.

options.title: Hire the Boatman
options.description: A nearby ferryman offers safe passage... for a price.

options.title: Rob the Stranded Travelers
options.description: With no escape, the stranded travelers are easy targets.
